title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny uses Claude Code's skills and agents to automate work, highlighting three strategies: agents, hooks, and loops. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's configuration to show techniques for maximizing Claude Code's capabilities.
